title: Daewoo Essentials 1.7L Fast Boil Electric Kettle – White Plastic Cordless Jug with Auto Shut-Off & Boil-Dry Protection, Compact, Easy to Use & Clean
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: 1.7L Large Capacity for Busy Homes – Boil enough water for up to 7 cups, perfect for breakfast time, family use or preparing multiple hot drinks in one go
Fast Boil with 1850-2200W Power – Boils water quickly to save you time on busy mornings, ideal for tea, coffee, or cooking preparation
Built-In Safety with Auto Shut-Off & Boil-Dry Protection – Designed for peace of mind with automatic shut-off when boiling is complete or when empty
Cordless Jug with Lightweight Plastic Body – Easy to handle and pour thanks to the cordless design and cool-touch plastic construction
Clear Water Gauge & Locking Lid – Fill accurately using the visible water level window, and enjoy spill-free boiling with the secure lid closure
description: Introducing the Daewoo 1.7 Litre Kettle, the perfect companion for every tea lover and host. With its impressive 1.7 litre water capacity, this kettle allows you to invite your friends and family over for a delightful brew, serving 6-7 cups in just one boil (depending on cup size). Say goodbye to multiple boiling cycles and enjoy a hot drink together, creating cherished moments. One of the key features of this kettle is its easy-to-clean design. The removable limescale filter ensures that every boil delivers fresh-tasting water. Simply wash it under a tap to prevent the build-up of lime scale and other residual elements, keeping your water tasting crisp and pure for longer. The Daewoo 1.7 Litre Kettle is packed with thoughtful features that enhance your boiling experience. Its LED light illuminates red when the kettle is switched on, indicating that the water is heating up. With the visible water gauge, you can effortlessly keep track of the remaining water level in your kettle before boiling. Additionally, the wide opening lid facilitates easy refills, saving you time and effort. Durability is a priority with this kettle. It comes equipped with an automatic shut off feature that activates when the water reaches its boiling point or when the kettle is running with minimal water. This not only protects the kettle from dry boiling but also ensures its longevity, giving you peace of mind and a reliable appliance that will serve you for years to come. Featuring a clean and sleek design, the Daewoo 1.7 Litre Kettle seamlessly blends into any kitchen decor. Its timeless appearance adds a touch of elegance, making it a perfect fit for both hosting tea parties and serving your morning coffee. Whether you're enjoying a peaceful cup alone or sharing a beverage with loved ones, this kettle is the ideal companion throughout the day, all year round. Upgrade your kitchen with the Daewoo 1.7 Litre Kettle and experience the perfect balance of functionality, style, and durability. It's time to create lasting memories and indulge in delightful hot drinks with ease and convenience.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Large Capacity 1.7L, Visible Water Gauge, LED Illuminate Light, Wide Opening Lid, Auto Shut Off, Boil-dry protection, Removable Filter For Easy Cleaning, Timeless Design
